raw_text:
WARNING [TC-H-002] interface.f90:2 <-> header.h:2
  BOOL_VS_INT_RETURN: Fortran returns LOGICAL(c_bool) (_Bool: 1 byte, 0 or 1).
  C prototype declares int return (4 bytes). On x86-64 SysV ABI both use
  RAX, but _Bool zero-extends only the low byte; int uses all 32 bits.
  High bytes of RAX may be non-zero garbage if return path is unusual.
  Use '_Bool' in C for exact semantic match.
